name: RallyUp REST API
description: RallyUp's REST API provides two basic functionalities: (1) Giving organizations easy access to their data in RallyUp to integrate with other data sources and data management software, and (2) Giving partners the ability to integrate basic functionalities of RallyUp within their own software.
